\startenvironment env-act
%
% ConTeXt environment for Agentic Cycle Theory papers.
% Adapted from Principia Ars Technica's tuftish typography.
%

% ── Fonts ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\input tuftish-fonts-lmtx

\usetypescript[tuftish]
\setupbodyfont[tuftish,rm,11pt]
\setupwhitespace[medium]
\setupinterlinespace[line=3ex]
\setupalign[width,hanging,fullhz,tolerant,stretch]
\setuptolerance[horizontal,verytolerant]

% Math fonts (Latin Modern for math, Garamond for text)
\setupmathematics[autopunctuation=yes]

% LaTeX compatibility macros for math
\def\operatorname#1{\mathop{\text{#1}}}
\def\boldsymbol#1{\mathbf{#1}}

% Minimal pmatrix/bmatrix/cases compatibility
% Using \startcases from ConTeXt and manual matrix definitions
\definemathmatrix[pmatrix][left={\left(},right={\right)}]
\definemathmatrix[bmatrix][left={\left[},right={\right]}]

% ── Colors ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usecolors[ral]
\definecolor[dark-txt]      [RAL7023]
\definecolor[light-txt]     [h=C6C5B2]
\definecolor[kinda-antique] [h=FFFEF2]
\definecolor[accent]        [h=8B0000]   % dark red for section headers
\definecolor[rulecolor]     [h=CCCCCC]

% ── Page layout ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
% US Letter, generous margins, right margin for notes
\setuppapersize[letter][letter]

\setuplayout[
  backspace=25mm,
  leftmargin=14mm, leftmargindistance=3mm,
  rightmargin=50mm, rightmargindistance=6mm,
  width=125mm,
  topspace=12mm, header=8mm, headerdistance=10mm,
  bottom=15mm, bottomdistance=3mm, footer=8mm,
  grid=yes]

\setuppagenumbering[location=none, alternative={doublesided,singlesided}]

% Margin notes
\setupmargindata[inrightmargin][
  location=right,
  width=45mm,
  align=flushleft,
  style={\switchtobodyfont[8.5pt]\setupinterlinespace[2.8ex]},
  stack=continue]

% ── Background ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\setupbackgrounds[paper][background=color,backgroundcolor=kinda-antique]

% ── Interaction ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\setupinteraction[
  state=start,
  color=accent,
  contrastcolor=accent,
  style=]

% ── Headers / Footers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\setupheadertexts[]
\setupfootertexts[\ss\userpagenumber][]

% ── Sectioning ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

% Parts (I, II, III for Adaptive Systems, Actuated Adaptation, Composites)
\setuphead[part][
  conversion=Romannumerals,
  style={\rmd\ss\sc},
  page=right,
  header=empty, footer=none,
  before={\blank[4*big]},
  after={\blank[2*big]}]

% Sections (top-level within a part)
\definefont[SectionFont][file:Roboto-Light.ttf*roboto-norm at 18pt]
\define[2]\actsectioncommand{\blank[3*big]\noindent{\SectionFont\color[dark-txt]{#2}}\blank[line]\noindent\blackrule[width=\textwidth,height=0.4pt,color=rulecolor]\blank[big]}
\setuphead[chapter][
  command=\actsectioncommand,
  number=no,
  header=empty, footer=none,
  page=right,
  before=, after=]

% ── Segment environments ────────────────────────────────────────────────
% Each ACT claim type gets a numbered, visually distinct block.
%
% Counter: shared across all types within a chapter (section).
\definecounter[claim][way=bychapter]

% \segmentheader{Type}{Title} — call directly from generated .tex
\define[2]\segmentheader{%
  \incrementcounter[claim]%
  \blank[big]%
  \noindent\blackrule[width=\textwidth,height=0.3pt,color=rulecolor]%
  \blank[halfline]%
  \noindent{\bf #1~\rawcountervalue[claim]}\enskip({\it #2}).%
  \blank[halfline]%
}

\define\segmentfooter{%
  \blank[halfline]%
  \noindent\blackrule[width=\textwidth,height=0.3pt,color=rulecolor]%
  \blank[big]%
}

% ── Internal headings within segments ────────────────────────────────────
% "Formal Expression", "Epistemic Status", "Discussion", etc.
\define[1]\segmentsubhead{\blank[halfline]\noindent{\bf #1.}\blank[none]}

% ── Blockquotes ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\definedelimitedtext[blockquote]
\setupdelimitedtext[blockquote][
  leftmargin=10mm,
  rightmargin=10mm,
  style={\it\setupbodyfont[small]}]

% ── Tables ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
% Use natural tables for flexibility
\setupTABLE[frame=off]
\setupTABLE[row][first][topframe=on,bottomframe=on,framecolor=rulecolor,rulethickness=0.5pt]
\setupTABLE[row][last][bottomframe=on,framecolor=rulecolor,rulethickness=0.5pt]
\setupTABLE[column][each][style={\switchtobodyfont[9pt]}]

% ── Code ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\setuptyping[style={\switchtobodyfont[tt,9pt]}]

% ── Descriptions ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\definedescription[desc][
  headstyle=bold, style=normal, align=flushleft,
  alternative=hanging, width=broad, margin=1cm]

\stopenvironment
